verdict.label: Go bodyboarding
verdict.headline: Go bodyboarding: Belgas Mid-morning — 10:00
verdict.reason: Best combined score from the checked sources: Rare window session, High confidence, with no major blocker for Belgas.

best.bestWind: ideal E/ENE/ESE, usable NE/SE, clean <=22 km/h

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 106 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 59/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label Rare window, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 106 kJ · 13 s period · wind is not fully clear.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for Fun progression, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 77 kJ, 13 s period, lully 33/100, and good wind at 5 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 77 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 5 km/h · Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean fun-sized window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 38 kJ, 13 s period, lully 5/100, and good wind at 4 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 90 kJ, 13 s period, consistent 65/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Expect: it is less reliable than the main bay spots, so weak swell or short period can make it feel soft.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is an inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay · label Worth checking, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 90 kJ · 13 s period · wind is not fully clear.
